description:
Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and maintain applications using
Oracle SQL, Python, and HTML
.
Write, optimise, and manage
complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and database structures
.
Support and enhance existing systems by identifying bugs, performance issues, and improvement opportunities.
Translate business requirements into
technical specifications and working solutions
.
Participate in full
System Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
including system study, development, testing, implementation, and support.
Collaborate with internal users and vendors to gather requirements and ensure system functionality meets operational needs.
Perform system testing, debugging, and troubleshooting to ensure stability and performance.
Prepare and maintain
technical documentation and user guides
.
Provide application support and act as a point of contact for system related issues.
Ensure data integrity, security, and confidentiality across all systems.
